title: fix: CI lint failure — golangci-lint version too old for Go 1.26.1
description: golangci-lint-action@v6 defaults to golangci-lint v1.64.8 (Go 1.24), but go.mod targets Go 1.26.1. Fix by pinning a compatible golangci-lint version in .github/workflows/ci.yml using the 'version' input of golangci-lint-action. Check https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases for the latest version supporting Go 1.26. File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-ci-lint/doozer-scaffold-2b28 — pinned golangci-lint v2.11.2

title: fix: bump golangci-lint-action to v7 for lint v2 support
description: golangci-lint-action@v6 does not support golangci-lint v2.x. Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to use golangci/golangci-lint-action@v7 with version: v2.11.2. This is a one-line change: replace @v6 with @v7 on the uses line. File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
closeReason: Merged — bumped golangci-lint-action to v7

title: fix: add version field to .golangci.yml for lint v2
description: golangci-lint v2 requires 'version: "2"' at the top of .golangci.yml. Add this field as the first line. Also check if the v2 config schema changed for linters/run sections — consult https://golangci-lint.run/docs/product/migration-guide. The v2 format may use 'linters.enable' differently. File: .golangci.yml
closeReason: Merged — added version: 2 to .golangci.yml, removed gosimple

title: fix: handle errcheck on os.RemoveAll in scaffold.go
description: golangci-lint errcheck flags unchecked os.RemoveAll at internal/scaffold/scaffold.go:27. This is cleanup on error path — the original error is more important, so the idiomatic fix is to discard explicitly with '_ = os.RemoveAll(targetDir)'. File: internal/scaffold/scaffold.go line 27.
closeReason: Merged — fixed errcheck on os.RemoveAll

title: feat: add husky pre-commit hook with markdown and Go linting
description: Add husky pre-commit hooks to run markdown linting (markdownlint-cli2) and Go linting (golangci-lint) on staged files before commit. Steps: 1) npm init -y, 2) npm install --save-dev husky markdownlint-cli2, 3) npx husky init, 4) Create .husky/pre-commit that runs markdownlint-cli2 on staged .md files and golangci-lint run on staged .go files, 5) Add .markdownlint.jsonc config if needed, 6) Add node_modules/ to .gitignore. golangci-lint is already configured (.golangci.yml with version 2). Acceptance: git commit triggers both linters on relevant staged files.
closeReason: Merged — husky pre-commit with markdownlint + golangci-lint

title: fix: husky pre-commit fails when no .md or .go files staged
description: Husky v9 runs pre-commit with 'set -e' by default. The grep commands on lines 4 and 12 of .husky/pre-commit exit with code 1 when no matching files are found, causing the entire hook to abort. Fix by appending '|| true' to both grep commands so they return empty string without failing. File: .husky/pre-commit lines 4 and 12.
closeReason: Merged — fixed grep exit codes in pre-commit hook

title: Exclude design-docs from pre-commit and CI linting
description: Exclude the design-docs/ directory from all linting: (1) In .husky/pre-commit, filter out files matching design-docs/ from STAGED_MD so markdownlint-cli2 does not run on them. (2) In .markdownlint.jsonc or a .markdownlintignore file, add design-docs/ to ignores so markdownlint-cli2 skips that directory. CI pipeline only runs golangci-lint (Go files) so no changes needed there. Files to modify: .husky/pre-commit, .markdownlint.jsonc (or add .markdownlintignore). Keep changes minimal.

title: Split CI pipeline into ci.yml and build.yml
description:
Current .github/workflows/ci.yml has 5 separate jobs (lint, test, markdownlint, cspell, build). Restructure into two workflow files:

1. ci.yml — two jobs:
   - linting: combines golangci-lint, markdownlint, and cspell into a single job. Needs both Go and Node setup. Runs all three lint steps sequentially.
   - tests: runs unit tests (go test ./internal/... -v) and acceptance tests (go test ./tests/acceptance/ -v).

2. build.yml — single build job that builds the binary (go build -o doozer-scaffold ./cmd/doozer-scaffold). Should depend on ci.yml passing (use workflow_run or keep same triggers).

Both files trigger on push to main and PR to main. build.yml needs: the ci workflow to pass — use workflow_run with workflows: ['CI'] and types: [completed] with a condition check, OR simply keep both triggered independently (simpler). User preference: keep it simple, both trigger on push/PR to main independently.

Acceptance criteria:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml has exactly 2 jobs: linting and tests
- .github/workflows/build.yml has 1 job: build
- All current checks still run (golangci-lint, markdownlint, cspell, unit tests, acceptance tests, build)
- No other workflow files modified or created
closeReason: Split ci.yml into linting+tests jobs; created build.yml as standalone workflow. All checks preserved.

title: Fix CI pipeline dependencies: tests needs linting, build needs CI
description:
The ci.yml and build.yml split was done but missing key dependencies:

1. In ci.yml: the 'tests' job must have 'needs: [linting]' so tests only run after linting passes.

2. build.yml must depend on the CI workflow completing successfully. Use workflow_run trigger:
   on:
     workflow_run:
       workflows: ['CI']
       types: [completed]
   And add an if condition on the build job: if: github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success'

Files to modify (in worktree overstory/builder-ci-split/doozer-scaffold-c448):
- .github/workflows/ci.yml — add needs: [linting] to the tests job
- .github/workflows/build.yml — change trigger to workflow_run dependent on CI, add success condition

The branch overstory/builder-ci-split/doozer-scaffold-c448 already has the base split done. This task amends it with the missing dependency chain.
closeReason: Superseded by doozer-scaffold-f05d

title: Consolidate CI linting into single job and fix tests dependency
description:
The current builder output has ci.yml with 4 separate jobs (lint, test, markdownlint, cspell). This is WRONG. The requirement is exactly 2 jobs in ci.yml:

JOB 1 - 'linting':
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  steps:
    - actions/checkout@v4
    - actions/setup-go@v5 (go-version: stable)
    - actions/setup-node@v4 (node-version: '22')
    - npm ci
    - golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint-action@v7, version: v2.11.2)
    - markdownlint (npx markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#design-docs')
    - cspell (npx cspell '**/*' --no-progress)

JOB 2 - 'tests':
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  needs: [linting]
  steps:
    - actions/checkout@v4
    - actions/setup-go@v5 (go-version: stable)
    - Unit tests: go test ./internal/... -v
    - Acceptance tests: go test ./tests/acceptance/ -v

Triggers: push to main, PR to main.

build.yml is ALREADY CORRECT on branch overstory/builder-ci-deps-1/doozer-scaffold-6efb (workflow_run on CI + success condition). Keep it as-is.

The builder should start from the canonical main branch (NOT from the previous builder branches) and write BOTH files fresh. This ensures a clean state.

Acceptance criteria:
- ci.yml has EXACTLY 2 jobs: linting and tests
- linting job has Go lint + markdown lint + cspell all as steps in ONE job
- tests job has needs: [linting]
- build.yml has workflow_run trigger on CI with success condition
- No other workflow files
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-ci-consolidate/doozer-scaffold-f05d — CI split into ci.yml (linting + tests) and build.yml

title: Restore full linting to pre-commit hook
description:
The .husky/pre-commit hook currently has markdownlint, cspell, and golangci-lint checks for staged files. Verify it is correct and working. The hook should run:

1. markdownlint-cli2 on staged .md files (excluding design-docs/ and AGENTS.md)
2. cspell on staged .go/.md/.tmpl files (excluding design-docs/ and AGENTS.md)  
3. golangci-lint run on staged .go files

Current hook looks correct but verify it actually works by checking the husky setup is intact (.husky/_/ directory exists, core.hooksPath is set). If anything is broken, fix it.

Acceptance: git commit with a staged .md or .go file triggers the pre-commit linting checks.
closeReason: Pre-commit hook verified working — no changes needed

title: Create .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc with ignores for node_modules and design-docs
description:
markdownlint-cli2 is scanning node_modules because there is no .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc config file. The .markdownlintignore file exists but markdownlint-cli2 needs its own config to reliably ignore paths.

Create .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc with:
{
  "ignores": ["node_modules/**", "design-docs/**", "AGENTS.md"]
}

This file tells markdownlint-cli2 which paths to skip. The existing .markdownlint.jsonc has rule config (MD033: false, MD013: false) and should remain unchanged — markdownlint-cli2 will pick it up automatically.

After creating the file, VERIFY by running: npx markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#design-docs'
It must exit 0 with no errors from node_modules.

File area: .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc (new file)
Acceptance: npx markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#design-docs' exits 0
closeReason: Merged — created .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc with ignores for node_modules, design-docs, AGENTS.md, .claude, .overstory

description:
npm ci fails because package-lock.json is out of sync with package.json. Error: Missing cspell@8.19.4 and related packages from lock file.

Fix: run 'npm install' to regenerate package-lock.json, then commit it.

Verify: npm ci succeeds after the fix.

File area: package-lock.json
Acceptance: npm ci exits 0

title: Stage 3a: Dockerfile technology definitions and tests
description: Add Dockerfile (Image) and Dockerfile (Service) technology definitions per SPEC-stage-3a.md. Includes: (1) dockerfile-image.yaml - standalone container image project, (2) dockerfile-service.yaml - composable Docker addition, (3) Unit tests for definition loading, validation, structure entries, devcontainer features, path conflicts, (4) Acceptance tests for standalone max/min, composable with Go, standalone rejection, all-composable combo. File areas: internal/techdef/technologies/, internal/techdef/techdef_test.go, tests/acceptance/acceptance_test.go. No engine/schema/config/prompt changes.

title: Stage 3a: Dockerfile definitions (TDD redo)
description:
REDO of Stage 3a. Previous attempt (doozer-scaffold-34d4) was rejected for TDD violation — builder committed everything in a single feat: commit with no red:/green: micro-commit cycle.

REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE:
1. STRICT TDD: Every test case starts with a red: commit (test that FAILS), followed by a green: commit (minimum code to pass). This must be visible in git history.
2. Implementation order per SPEC Section 8:
   - Step 1: dockerfile-image.yaml — write failing tests first (red:), then create YAML (green:)
   - Step 2: dockerfile-service.yaml — same pattern
   - Step 3: Constraint/conflict tests — red: then green:
   - Step 4: Acceptance tests — red: then green:
3. ATOMIC COMMITS: After all tests pass, squash red:/green: micro-commits into conventional atomic commits (feat:, test:) using git reset --soft
4. Each squashed commit = smallest complete meaningful change
5. All existing tests must continue passing

File areas: internal/techdef/technologies/*.yaml, internal/techdef/techdef_test.go, tests/acceptance/acceptance_test.go

Spec: design-docs/SPEC-stage-3a.md
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-stage3a/doozer-scaffold-d538. Stage 3a Dockerfile definitions implemented with TDD (4 red/green pairs verified). All tests pass.

title: Stage 3a: Dockerfile definitions (v3 — TDD + atomic commits)
description:
Third attempt at Stage 3a. Previous attempts rejected:
- v1: no TDD micro-commits at all
- v2: TDD followed but squashed into 1 commit instead of atomic commits

BOTH requirements are NON-NEGOTIABLE:

TDD MICRO-COMMITS:
- red: write ONE failing test, run tests to confirm failure, commit 'red: <description>'
- green: write MINIMUM code to pass, run tests, commit 'green: <description>'
- Repeat for every test case

ATOMIC COMMIT SQUASH (after all tests pass):
- git reset --soft <base> to unstage all micro-commits
- Re-commit as 4 SEPARATE atomic conventional commits:
  1. 'feat: add Dockerfile (Image) technology definition' (yaml + its unit tests)
  2. 'feat: add Dockerfile (Service) technology definition' (yaml + its unit tests)
  3. 'test: add constraint and path conflict tests for Dockerfile definitions'
  4. 'test: add Stage 3a acceptance tests'
- Each commit must be independently valid (go test ./... passes at each point)
- Tests must pass at EVERY commit, not just the final one

Spec: design-docs/SPEC-stage-3a.md
Files: internal/techdef/technologies/*.yaml, internal/techdef/techdef_test.go, tests/acceptance/acceptance_test.go
closeReason: Merged. Stage 3a complete with proper TDD (red/green micro-commits) and 4 atomic conventional commits.

title: Stage 3b: Helm chart technology with variant group mechanism
description: Implement Stage 3b per SPEC-stage-3b.md. Six sequential steps: (1) variant_group schema + engine support (resolution, prompt collapse, mode-scoped prompts, validation), (2) migrate Terraform and Dockerfile definitions to variant groups, (3) helm-chart.yaml standalone definition, (4) helm-deployment.yaml composable definition, (5) acceptance verification, (6) CI verification. All work must follow strict TDD (Section 0.1) and atomic commits (Section 0.2). See design-docs/SPEC-stage-3b.md for full spec and design-docs/ADR - Stage 3b.md for architectural decisions.
closeReason: Stage 3b: variant group mechanism (VariantGroup field, ValidateVariantGroups, ResolveVariantGroups, FilteredPrompts, BuildTechDisplayOptions, config.Validate update, main.go wiring), Terraform+Dockerfile migration to variant groups, Helm Chart + Helm Deployment definitions. 9 atomic commits with TDD.

title: Stage 3b v2: Helm chart technology with variant group mechanism
description:
RETRY — previous attempt rejected for process violations.

Implement Stage 3b per design-docs/SPEC-stage-3b.md.

PROCESS REQUIREMENTS — READ CAREFULLY:

1. TDD: Every feature follows red/green/refactor. Write the FAILING test first (red: commit), then implement to pass (green: commit). Both commits must exist in the history.

2. ATOMIC COMMITS — INCREMENTAL, NOT BATCHED:
   - After EACH red/green TDD cycle, IMMEDIATELY squash that cycle into ONE atomic commit.
   - Do NOT accumulate multiple TDD cycles and squash at the end.
   - The workflow for each feature is: red: commit → green: commit → squash into atomic commit → move to next feature.
   - One red/green/refactor TDD cycle = one atomic commit.

3. EACH SPEC STEP produces its own atomic commits. Do NOT combine steps.

Implementation steps (sequential):
Step 1: variant_group schema + engine (multiple atomic commits — one per feature)
Step 2: Migrate Terraform + Dockerfile to variant groups (separate atomic commits)
Step 3: helm-chart.yaml standalone (own atomic commit)
Step 4: helm-deployment.yaml composable (own atomic commit)
Step 5: Acceptance verification
Step 6: CI verification

See design-docs/SPEC-stage-3b.md for full spec.
closeReason: Stage 3b v2 complete: variant group mechanism with auto-selection (standalone vs composable), Helm Chart and Helm Deployment definitions, Terraform/Dockerfile migration to variant groups, FilterPromptsByMode, CI template resolution, acceptance tests. 14 atomic commits on branch overstory/builder-commit-fix/doozer-scaffold-0fed.

title: Stage 3b: Split bundled prompt commit 9166ba7
description:
The Stage 3b implementation is complete on branch overstory/builder-commit-fix/doozer-scaffold-0fed but commit 9166ba7 bundles two features that must be separate atomic commits:

1. BuildTechOptionList — collapses variant groups into single display entries in the tech prompt
2. FilterPromptsByMode — filters technology-driven prompts based on resolved variant mode

These are different responsibilities (display vs filtering) and must be separate commits.

Task: Split commit 9166ba7 into two separate atomic commits on the builder-commit-fix branch. The branch is at: overstory/builder-commit-fix/doozer-scaffold-0fed

Files affected: internal/prompt/prompt.go and internal/prompt/prompt_test.go

Use selective staging to separate the two features. All tests must pass after the split.

TDD is not required for this task — this is pure commit surgery on already-tested code.
closeReason: Split bundled commit 9166ba7 into two atomic commits: (1) feat(prompt): collapse variant groups into single entries in tech option list, (2) feat(prompt): filter technology-driven prompts by resolved variant mode. All subsequent commits preserved via cherry-pick. Branch: overstory/builder-split-v2/doozer-scaffold-0d34.

title: Stage 3b: Missing and incomplete acceptance tests
description:
The Stage 3b implementation is merged but acceptance test coverage has 7 gaps against SPEC Section 5. These must be fixed.

MISSING acceptance tests (no coverage):
- #3: No test verifying prompt collapses variant groups into single entries (Helm/Terraform/Dockerfile appear once each)
- #8: No test for Terraform variant group resolution ('Terraform' sole selection -> module layout, 'Terraform' + Go -> infrastructure layout)
- #9: No test for Dockerfile variant group resolution ('Dockerfile' sole selection -> image layout, 'Dockerfile' + Go -> service layout)
- #15: No test for path conflict verification between composable Helm and other composable techs

INCOMPLETE acceptance tests (partial = failed):
- #10: Existing Terraform/Dockerfile tests use definition keys directly, not variant group names — they do not prove the variant group resolution path works
- #16: Composable variant .gitignore Helm section is not checked (only standalone is)
- #17: Devcontainer Helm setup commands (curl helm install script, helm-unittest plugin) are not verified — only the Kubernetes Tools extension is checked

File to modify: tests/acceptance/acceptance_test.go
Also read: design-docs/SPEC-stage-3b.md Section 5 for exact acceptance criteria wording

All new tests must follow TDD (red/green) and atomic commits (one per TDD cycle, squashed immediately).
closeReason: Merged — 6 acceptance tests covering 7 SPEC gaps

title: Write CLAUDE.md, dispatch template, and memory files
description: Create 5 files with coordinator enforcement protocol and memory. Content will be provided via dispatch mail. No TDD required — these are documentation files, not code.
closeReason: Merged CLAUDE.md and dispatch template

title: Create memory files in repo for user to copy
description: Create 3 memory files at .overstory/memory/ in the repo. User will copy them to ~/.claude/projects/ path. Content provided via dispatch mail.
closeReason: Merged memory files to .overstory/memory/

title: Fix cspell CI failure: add git terms to dictionary
description: CI is failing because CLAUDE.md uses git terms not in cspell.json dictionary. Add 'reflog', 'worktree', and 'oneline' to the words array in cspell.json. Acceptance: cspell passes with no errors on all tracked files.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-cspell-words/doozer-scaffold-ff40

title: Fix pre-commit hook: align cspell scope with CI
description: The pre-commit hook filters cspell to only .go/.md/.tmpl staged files, but CI runs cspell on all files ('**/*'). This mismatch allowed CLAUDE.md cspell failures to reach CI uncaught. Fix: change the cspell section of .husky/pre-commit to run on ALL staged files (not extension-filtered), matching CI scope. The cspell.json ignorePaths already handles exclusions. Acceptance: (1) cspell section runs on all staged files regardless of extension, (2) design-docs/ and AGENTS.md exclusions in the cspell grep can be removed since cspell.json ignorePaths handles them, (3) hook still exits non-zero on cspell failure.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-hook-fix/doozer-scaffold-e275

title: Fix pre-commit hook: cspell exits 1 when all staged files are ignored
description: Regression from doozer-scaffold-e275. The broadened cspell scope passes all staged files to cspell, but when every file is in cspell.json ignorePaths (e.g. staging only .seeds/issues.jsonl), cspell exits 1 despite 0 issues. This blocks commits of non-linted files. Fix: either filter out cspell-ignored paths before invoking, or append '|| true' when cspell reports 0 issues, or exclude known non-source paths. Simplest fix: keep the broad scope but exclude paths that are in cspell.json ignorePaths (.seeds/, .mulch/, .overstory/, node_modules/, etc) from the STAGED_SPELL variable. Acceptance: committing only .seeds/issues.jsonl succeeds with hooks enabled.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-hook-fix-2/doozer-scaffold-adc3

title: Fix CI: update GitHub Actions to Node.js 24 compatible versions
description: GitHub Actions deprecation warning: actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-go@v5, actions/setup-node@v4, golangci/golangci-lint-action@v7 all run on Node.js 20 which is deprecated. Update to latest versions that support Node.js 24. File: .github/workflows/ci.yml. Acceptance: CI passes with no Node.js 20 deprecation warnings.
closeReason: Updated GitHub Actions in ci.yml and build.yml to Node.js 24 compatible versions: checkout@v6, setup-go@v6, setup-node@v6, golangci-lint-action@v9
